message: 🌱 Add thanos: Compact: Offline deduplication mission (#643)

+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current thanos deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your thanos version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nhelm list -n thanos 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working thanos installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review thanos configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant thanos configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nkubectl get configmap -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=thanos\n```\nCurrently Thanos provides dedup function in Query component, it can merge the data on the fly from Prometheus HA pairs or remote object storage."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Compact: Offline deduplication",
+        "description": "As the discussion in #1014, implement a new feature in compactor which provides offline deduplication function for the data from different replicas.\n\nThe offline deduplication follow the same design with [query deduplication](https://thanos.io/components/query.md/#deduplication). The user needs to\n```yaml\n| 01E4N18DW7663APZ5V0B3D3CY1 | 30-03-2020 05:30:00 | 30-03-2020 06:00:00 | 30m0s    | 39h30m0s   | 545,049    | 50,824,911     | 545,054     | 1          | false       | replica=thanos-receive-0 | 0s         | receive   |\n| 01E4N18DW8A4Z0ES2GCXBFEVVH | 30-03-2020 05:30:00 | 30-03-2020 06:00:00 | 30m0s    | 39h30m0s   | 545,049    | 50,824,911     | 545,054     | 1          | false       | replica=thanos-receive-2 | 0s         | receive   |\n| 01E4N18DW8AR0CRXN0F4N0F7VY | 30-03-2020 05:30:00 | 30-03-2020 06:00:00 | 30m0s    | 39h30m0s   | 545,049    | 50,824,911     | 545,054     | 1          | \n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nkubectl get events -n thanos --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Compact: Offline deduplication\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "As the discussion in #1014, implement a new feature in compactor which provides offline deduplication function for the data from different replicas.\n\nThe offline deduplication follow the same design with [query deduplication](https://thanos.io/components/query.md/#deduplication).",
